name: McMenamins Kennedy School
heroSub: A private film screening & buffet dinner at McMenamins Kennedy School.
formIntro: Dinner is included. Because we order one buffet for the whole group, pick the package you would most enjoy.
formNote: Buffet packages do not include a plated starter. Vote for a shared appetizer package or skip. Beverage: water, soda, or alcohol.
footer: Retirement Everest · Private Screening Series · McMenamins Kennedy School · Portland, OR
